name: Maurice Williams
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
base_skills: Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, Python (FastAPI, Django, Flask), .NET Core, REST APIs, GraphQL
Frontend: TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Angular, React Native, TanStack, Tailwind, MUI
Cloud and DevOps: AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform
Architecture: Microservices, Multi-Tenant SaaS, Event-Driven Systems, Kafka, RabbitMQ
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL Server, MySQL, Redis
AI and Automation: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, LLM Integration, Prompt Engineering, Predictive Modeling, Autonomous Workflows
Testing and QA: Jest, Cypress, React Testing Library, Jasmine, Karma, Protractor, Mocha, PyTest
Engineering Practices: System Architecture, Security (SOC2, XSS, CORS), Web Accessibility (WCAG), Agile/Scrum, Mentorship, Code Reviews

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer

Designed scalable backend services with Python and FastAPI integrated with OpenAI-based AI workflows, improving automation efficiency by 40%.
Built responsive cross-platform mobile applications with React Native for executive coaching and business intelligence solutions.
Architected cloud-native infrastructure on AWS using Docker and Kubernetes, achieving highly available and secure deployments.
Developed reusable frontend systems with Next.js and TypeScript, improving maintainability and reducing development time by 30%.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and automated testing workflows, significantly improving release reliability and deployment frequency.
Mentored engineering teams on scalable architecture, AI integrations, and modern TypeScript development practices.
